profile_classes.required_human_gate: Owner confirms live, public and cost decisions explicitly.
IT/KI confirms local runtime readiness; owner confirms costs and external accounts.
Project lead confirms project-local decisions before design, draw or publish handoff.
Design/drawing actions need project lead or model-quality review before writes.
Every project-impacting step escalates to a supervising human.

checks.label: Local identity contract status is ready.
Local identity contract is static review-only.
All required profile classes are present.
Every profile class has roles, future scope, preview scope, human gate and privacy requirement.
Preview, decision and learning session boundaries are present.
Session boundaries block persistence, signatures, scores or sync today.
All sensitive identity capabilities are blocked today.
Component imports the local identity contract.
Component renders local identity boundary copy.
Component states logins, accounts, passwords, persistence, cookies, personal writes and external identity providers are blocked.
Orbit route imports the local identity component.
Orbit route renders a local-identity anchor.
Section index links to local identity.

next_actions: Use this contract before implementing real auth, profile persistence or session storage.
Keep role switching as browser preview until local identity storage is explicitly designed.
Use the profile classes to connect Workstation Profiles, Permission Matrix and Audit Trail.
